input:
POST /admin/backfill/fragment-relationships triggers a manual backfill run.

The endpoint enqueues a BullMQ job and returns { enqueued: true, jobId } immediately — the actual O(n²) cosine similarity sweep runs out-of-band on the regen worker.

Idempotent: the unique index on (srcType, srcId, dstType, dstId, edgeType) prevents duplicate edges.
notes: Technical spec for an endpoint. Three distinct facts about the endpoint.
